author: bharatankaraju
description: Per-ticker residual-reversion fade trades using sector-cohort leave-one-out mean residuals with rolling 20-day lagged sigma. Entry at |z|>=3 on a given session; exit at subsequent close. EOD-entry MODE A (Section 7.1).

universe.coverage_ratio_estimate_pct_delisted: <5% — NOT yet measured; Section 6 builds this gate

date_range.notes: Initial 3-month holdout per Section 10.1. Full 20% holdout will require waiting until sufficient new data accrues or accepting a smaller tuning window.

statistical_test.rationale: Bonferroni/FDR in effect under Section 14.5 primary=ticker-family scope; Section 9B.2 requires >=100k when multiplicity active.

hypothesis_family_scope.notes: Primary: 213 tickers x 2 directions = 426 pairwise hypotheses. Bonferroni adjusted alpha = 0.05 / 426 = 1.17e-4.

power_analysis.min_detectable_effect_pct_at_80_power: to be computed per ticker before hypothesis passes 9.2 gate

pre_exploration_disclosure: An exploratory pre-standards run on 2026-04-23 (commits f5af8d8, subsequent) examined the same universe informally. That run is NOT the registered test and is tagged RESEARCH-only. Known exploratory finding: TORNTPOWER showed +1.53% gross edge at 1000-shuffle p=0.0000, but at that resolution Bonferroni-adjusted significance (p <= 1.17e-4) is unreachable — the formal registered run will re-test at >=100k shuffles. No point estimates from the exploratory run shall be used to set thresholds for the formal test (Section 0.3).

author: bharatankaraju
description: Single-ticker single-direction pilot of the TA Coincidence Scorer. Enter LONG RELIANCE on any session where the daily TA attractiveness score (0-100, logistic of 6-feature interaction model from pipeline.ta_scorer) is >=70 at EOD close. Exit at subsequent close (T+1). EOD-entry MODE A (Section 7.1). This is the first deployment of the Compliance framework on a TA-class hypothesis; designed to be a single-hypothesis pilot so multiplicity correction is inert (family size = 1).

claimed_edge.notes: User-specified claimed edge: net T+1 >= 0.5% at S1 slippage (20 bps round-trip Zerodha SSF), hit-rate >= 55%, p <= 1e-3 at >=100k permutations. Single-hypothesis family means no Bonferroni/FDR adjustment is applied.

universe.survivorship_status: N/A — single-ticker pilot, RELIANCE has been continuously listed through the entire window

date_range.notes: 3-month forward holdout. Under-spec vs Section 10.1 20% requirement — flagged, accepted for pilot. If gate fails for holdout-size reason alone, extend holdout.

statistical_test.rationale: Single-hypothesis family means p_raw <= 0.001 is equivalent to p_corrected <= 0.001 (no adjustment needed). 100k permutations still required for p-value resolution below the 1e-3 floor per Section 9B.2.

hypothesis_family_scope.notes: Family size 1: no multiplicity correction. If the TA scorer is later extended to more tickers, each new (ticker, direction) becomes its own registered hypothesis with ticker-family multiplicity in effect.

power_analysis.min_detectable_effect_pct_at_80_power: to be computed from the daily return std of RELIANCE over the training window, prior to gate evaluation

pre_exploration_disclosure: The TA Coincidence Scorer was fitted on RELIANCE via UAP Task 8 (commit da9e0cf and follow-ups). The current RELIANCE model shows health=RED, mean_auc=0.485, min_fold_auc=0.173 across 6 walk-forward quarterly folds, which indicates the classifier does not exceed chance on out-of-sample data. This pre-registration deliberately proceeds despite the RED health — the purpose of the pilot is to demonstrate the compliance gate rejects un-robust TA strategies before they reach PAPER-SHADOW, mirroring the Phase C precedent (H-2026-04-23-001 FAIL, 2026-04-23). No point estimates from the walk-forward are used to set the 0.5%/55%/1e-3 thresholds (Section 0.3 pre-registration principle upheld; the thresholds match the phase-c registration for consistency across the framework).
raw_bar_canonicity_policy: docs/superpowers/policies/2026-04-23-raw-bar-canonicity.md v1.0 — MODE A T, T+1 execution window gate applies.

author: bharatankaraju
description: FOLLOW trades on Phase C OPPORTUNITY_LAG events — the geometric slice where sign(expected_return) != sign(residual). Backtest FADE direction and live engine FOLLOW direction agree on this slice by construction. Entry LONG if expected_return>0 else SHORT at EOD close; exit T+1 close. MODE A EOD. Registered as a distinct family from H-2026-04-23-001 because the event-restriction changes the null distribution and the family size.

claimed_edge.notes: Thresholds copied from H-2026-04-23-001 for framework consistency (spec §7.5). Not derived from slice's observed numbers (§0.3 pre-registration rule).

date_range.notes: Inherits H-2026-04-23-001 holdout window; same 3-month forward slice.

statistical_test.rationale: Reuse H-2026-04-23-001 compliance engine — see runner_phase_c_slice.py. Family size depends on post-filter cell count (n>=10 after LAG-only restriction).

hypothesis_family_scope.notes: Family size finalized after n>=10 filter applies — written into the slice run's manifest.json.

power_analysis.min_detectable_effect_pct_at_80_power: to be computed per cell from the slice's standard deviation before gate evaluation

pre_exploration_disclosure: The parent hypothesis H-2026-04-23-001 was executed and failed Bonferroni (0 survivors at 1.17e-4). An FDR research memo flagged 5 positive-edge survivors at BH-FDR alpha=0.05; separately, the spec 2026-04-23-phase-c-follow-vs-fade-audit-design.md observed that backtest FADE and live engine FOLLOW agree on LAG-geometry events but disagree on OVERSHOOT-geometry events. This registration tests the LAG slice in isolation. No slice p-values have been computed prior to this registration. No thresholds are derived from slice-observed numbers — all thresholds copied from H-2026-04-23-001 (Section 0.3 pre-registration upheld).
raw_bar_canonicity_policy: docs/superpowers/policies/2026-04-23-raw-bar-canonicity.md v1.0 — MODE A T, T+1 execution window gate applies.

author: bharatankaraju
description: FADE trades on Phase C OPPORTUNITY_OVERSHOOT events — the geometric slice where sign(expected_return) == sign(residual). Backtest FADE direction and live engine FOLLOW direction are opposite on this slice by construction. Entry SHORT if expected_return>0 else LONG at EOD close (the OPPOSITE of what the live engine does today); exit T+1 close. MODE A EOD. If this passes and H-2026-04-23-002 does not, the live engine is actively mis-trading overshoot events.

claimed_edge.notes: Thresholds copied from H-2026-04-23-001 for framework consistency (spec §7.5). Not derived from slice's observed numbers (§0.3 pre-registration rule).

date_range.notes: Inherits H-2026-04-23-001 holdout window; same 3-month forward slice.

statistical_test.rationale: Reuse H-2026-04-23-001 compliance engine — see runner_phase_c_slice.py. Family size depends on post-filter cell count (n>=10 after OVERSHOOT-only restriction).

hypothesis_family_scope.notes: Family size finalized after n>=10 filter applies — written into the slice run's manifest.json.

power_analysis.min_detectable_effect_pct_at_80_power: to be computed per cell from the slice's standard deviation before gate evaluation

pre_exploration_disclosure: Same as H-2026-04-23-002. No slice p-values computed before registration. No thresholds derived from slice-observed numbers.
raw_bar_canonicity_policy: docs/superpowers/policies/2026-04-23-raw-bar-canonicity.md v1.0 — MODE A T, T+1 execution window gate applies.

author: bharatankaraju
description: Lasso regression on 236-dim cross-sectional feature vector (212 peer z-scores + 17 sector means + vix + 3 regime one-hots + 2 self z's + break direction) predicting T+1 return on the persistent-break subset (|z|>=3 on T and T-1, same sign) of the 14,907-event H-2026-04-23-001 parent panel. Sign-triggered trading rule around frozen epsilon = 0.5*median(|training_predictions|). Single-model family: Bonferroni alpha = 0.05.

claimed_edge.notes: Single-model family. No point estimates from exploratory work are used to calibrate thresholds. Epsilon is calibrated on training-set prediction magnitudes, not holdout.

date_range.notes: Holdout 6% flagged as warning vs Section 10.1 20% target; accepted at registration to maintain comparability with H-2026-04-23-001/002/003 parent slice.

statistical_test.rationale: Single-model family means p_raw <= 0.05 is final; 100k shuffles per Section 9B.2 to resolve well below 1e-3 floor.

hypothesis_family_scope.notes: Family size 1: no multiplicity correction. Separate from the per-cell ticker-family scope of H-2026-04-23-001 by design.

power_analysis.min_detectable_effect: to be computed from training-set prediction std before gate evaluation

pre_exploration_disclosure: H-2026-04-23-001 parent panel has been fully explored including 2 slice hypotheses (H-002 LAG, H-003 OVERSHOOT) all FAIL at Bonferroni. This new registration reframes from per-cell tests to a single family-of-1 predictive model. No feature weights, alphas, or thresholds from prior work are used to calibrate this model; the full LassoCV grid selects alpha on training data only. The 2-day persistence filter is pre-registered here, not derived from exploratory survivor inspection.
raw_bar_canonicity_policy: docs/superpowers/policies/2026-04-23-raw-bar-canonicity.md v1.0 — MODE A T, T+1 execution window gate applies.
abandonment_reason: Pre-execution smoke check revealed only 116 persistent events satisfying |z|>=3 on both T and T-1 (same sign) in the 14,907-event parent panel. Spec anticipated 1,000-2,000 events and bound 'revisit if n<500'. Per Section 0.3 pre-registration rule, cannot relax z_threshold or persistence_days on this hypothesis ID. Abandoning before feature build/model fit; re-brainstorming a more populated persistence definition (likely |z|>=3 on T AND |z|>=2 on T-1, same sign) for registration as H-2026-04-24-003. No compute was spent on LassoCV or permutations; no point estimates were observed beyond raw event counts.

author: bharatankaraju
description: v2 of H-2026-04-24-002 (abandoned at n=116). Lasso regression on 236-dim cross-sectional feature vector over the asymmetric persistent-break subset (|z|>=3 on T AND |z|>=2 on T-1, same sign) of the 14,907-event H-2026-04-23-001 parent panel. Single-model family: Bonferroni alpha = 0.05.

claimed_edge.notes: Single-model family. Epsilon frozen on training-set prediction magnitudes.

date_range.notes: 18% holdout clears Section 9.3 >=50-event gate; still PARTIAL vs Section 10.1 20% target but substantially reduced warning vs H-002's 6%.

statistical_test.rationale: Single-model family means p_raw <= 0.05 is final; 100k shuffles per Section 9B.2.

power_analysis.min_detectable_effect: to be computed from training-set prediction std before gate evaluation

pre_exploration_disclosure: H-2026-04-24-002 was abandoned at n=116. Before registering this successor, a count-only diagnostic measured 5 candidate persistence rules: ORIG=116, A=318, B=507, C=316, D=675. Rule A was chosen for matching the T-1-specific persistence intuition of the parent thesis, NOT for maximizing count. 18% holdout window was chosen to give rule A's 318 events a ~57-event holdout, clearing the Section 9.3 >=50 gate. NO model fits, predictions, or p-values were computed from any rule before this registration; only raw event counts observed.
raw_bar_canonicity_policy: docs/superpowers/policies/2026-04-23-raw-bar-canonicity.md v1.0 — MODE A T, T+1 execution window gate applies.

author: bharatankaraju
description: T-7 to T-3 stock-vs-peer-cohort cumulative residual return z-scored against trailing 252d (trigger |z|>=1.5) with T-3 to T-1 dPCR same-direction >=1.0sigma confirmation (post-hoc cohort filter). Entry at T-3 close VWAP, exit T-1 close VWAP. Peers = top-3 nearest by market cap within NSE sectoral-index sector, frozen ex-ante. Macro exclude when |sector_index_return|>=1.5% on T or T+1 OR India VIX z(60d)>=2.0 on T. PCR feature is residualised against news-impact scores per data validation policy 14.4. No filter-relaxation fallback.

claimed_edge.notes: Single-hypothesis family. Thresholds copied from H-2026-04-24-001 precedent for framework consistency, NOT from earnings-window observations.

date_range.notes: 18-month window. 17% holdout clears 9.3 50-event gate; PARTIAL vs 10.1 20% target; user-specified window.

statistical_test.rationale: Single-model family means p_raw <= 0.05 final; 100k for resolution below 1e-3.

hypothesis_family_scope.notes: Family size 1; no multiplicity correction. Sector-level audit slices may be cut post-pass for risk attribution but do not affect the primary p-value.

power_analysis.expected_n_holdout: TBD post backfill - must clear 9.1 30-per-regime gate
power_analysis.min_detectable_effect: to be computed from training-set residual std before gate evaluation

pre_exploration_disclosure: User pre-locked four design parameters (T-1 strict exit, ex-ante same-sector + size-bucket peers, macro exclusion at 1.5% sector-index OR VIX z>=2sigma, no in-place filter relaxation) on 2026-04-25 in conversation. Trigger |z|>=1.5 and dPCR >=1.0sigma same-direction confirmed by user 2026-04-25 based on assistant proposal grounded in PEAD-literature convention and H-2026-04-24-001 precedent. Peer-cohort granularity (NSE sectoral indices) and size-bucket rule (top-3 nearest by market cap) recommended by assistant after user gave open-ended sector definition; locked into design without user override. IndianAPI corporate_actions endpoint was probed on 5 stocks (RELIANCE/HDFCBANK/TCS/MARUTI/BHARTIARTL) BEFORE this registration to confirm authenticity and earnings-event recoverability - only event counts and date cadences observed; NO returns, edges, or backtest numbers computed from any earnings-window data prior to this registration. Thresholds were NOT calibrated from any observed earnings-window distribution.
raw_bar_canonicity_policy: docs/superpowers/policies/2026-04-23-raw-bar-canonicity.md v1.0 - MODE A T-3, T-1 execution window gate applies.

author: bharatankaraju
description: Small multi-task MLP (~50k params) conditioned on T-1 ETF state vector (30 ETFs x {ret_1d, ret_5d, ret_20d} = 90 features) + per-ticker stock-context features (6) + learned stock embedding (8 dim) predicts T per-stock 3-class tail label (down_tail / neutral / up_tail) sigma-thresholded at |r_t| > 1.5 * sigma_60d (strict, sigma excludes t). Held-out cross-entropy loss must beat the strongest of three locked baselines (B0 always-prior, B1 regime-one-hot logistic, B2 full-feature logistic with 4 hand-designed ETF x stock-context interactions) by >= 0.005 nats. Single-claim, family size = 1, no Bonferroni. PyTorch CPU-only on Contabo VPS.

claimed_edge.notes: Single-hypothesis family. Margin and p-floor copied from H-2026-04-23-001 framework defaults; tightened p-floor to 0.01 (vs 0.05) because path D publishes accuracy claims directly to users.

universe.source: pipeline/data/fno_universe_history.json (point-in-time) intersected with pipeline/data/fno_historical/<symbol>.csv per-day membership
universe.drop_rule: Tickers with <30 down_tail OR <30 up_tail examples in training window are dropped at panel build with DROPPED_INSUFFICIENT_TAIL_LABELS; dropped list logged in panel manifest

date_range.notes: 12-month holdout = 17% of total panel; clears 9.3 50-event gate by ~3 orders of magnitude (n approx 52k); PARTIAL vs 10.1 20% target; user-accepted at registration. 24-month extension available pre-execution if desired.

statistical_test.rationale: Single-model family means p_raw <= 0.01 final; 100k for resolution below 1e-4. Permuting class labels in holdout breaks the ETF-feature -> tail-class signal while preserving class base rates.

hypothesis_family_scope.notes: Family size 1; no multiplicity correction. Per-class and per-ticker decompositions are post-hoc audit slices and do not affect the primary p-value.

power_analysis.expected_n_holdout: approx 52000 ticker-day predictions across 211 tickers x 250 trading days; well above 9.1 30-per-regime gate (52k / 5 regimes approx 10k per regime)
power_analysis.min_detectable_effect: 0.005 nats CE margin at p=0.01 with n=52k is detectable at >99% power per binomial-CE conversion

pre_exploration_disclosure: User pre-locked all design parameters in 2026-04-25 brainstorming session AFTER H-2026-04-25-001 backtest verdict (FAILED). Locked: (1) path D forecast-only deployment, path B basket tilt deferred to separate hypothesis; (2) 3-class label set (down/neutral/up), per-ticker sigma_60d threshold at 1.5 sigma; (3) input representation = raw ETF returns at 1d/5d/20d windows + stock embedding (8d) + stock context (6); (4) C1 single-claim model-level test + M3 calibration backstop; (5) architecture A small MLP under test, architecture C interactions logistic as locked baseline; (6) 12-month holdout with PARTIAL §10 acknowledged. Margin 0.005 nats and p-floor 0.01 are framework defaults from prior hypothesis precedent (H-2026-04-23-001 family, H-2026-04-25-001), NOT calibrated from any observed model output. sigma=1.5 chosen because it generates approx 7% per-tail base rates on Indian F&O daily returns (verified by ad-hoc count on RELIANCE/HDFCBANK/TCS WITHOUT inspecting any return values beyond the count). No exploratory model was fit before this registration. The 4 interaction terms in B2 baseline (brazil x sector, dollar x sector, vix x vol_z, india_etf x 52w_high_dist) are pre-locked at registration, no post-hoc additions allowed.
raw_bar_canonicity_policy: docs/superpowers/policies/2026-04-23-raw-bar-canonicity.md v1.0 - path D MODE_NONE_FORECAST_ONLY: no execution timing window applies.

changes.summary: Added 10 NSE sectoral indices (BANKNIFTY, NIFTYAUTO, NIFTYENERGY, NIFTYFMCG, NIFTYIT, NIFTYMEDIA, NIFTYMETAL, NIFTYPHARMA, NIFTYPSUBANK, NIFTYREALTY) to C.ETF_SYMBOLS. Net global state vector grows 28 -> 38 indices.
changes.rationale: Sectoral indices have continuous 5-year coverage (no IPO discontinuities) and provide India-side directional signal. Added to mitigate the data gap from NSE pre-2024 archive endpoints being permanently 404.

changes.summary: Universe pinned to canonical_fno_research_v1 (154 tickers = 133 stable F&O members + 21 IPOs with >= 100 bars).
changes.rationale: NSE pre-2024 F&O archive endpoints permanently 404; pre-2024 universe membership unrecoverable from public sources. Canonical universe artifact at pipeline/data/canonical_fno_research_v1.json provides point-in-time-correct membership for IPOs and a documented survivorship-bias bound for stable members.

rationale_block: All three changes are pre-holdout: prior real-run attempts terminated inside panel-build, before any model fit on the holdout window. No held-out cross-entropy number exists yet.

changes.summary: Added explicit adjustment_mode block + audit_doc reference to canonical_fno_research_v1 entry per anka_data_validation_policy_global_standard.md §10. F&O equity CSVs = dividend_adjusted_close, sectoral indices = total_return_index, global ETF panel = dividend_adjusted_close.
changes.rationale: Schema completeness for Approved-for-research status. No model behaviour change.

changes.summary: Backfilled 3 stub ETF parquets to unblock panel assembly: india_vix_daily (real, from pipeline/data/vix_history.csv, 1321 rows); fii_net_daily and dii_net_daily (SYNTHETIC, 19-day Trendlyne snapshot 25 Mar->24 Apr 2026 cyclically replicated across canonical Indian trading-day index, 1236 rows each).
changes.rationale: First real run failed because panel.py:dropna(how="any") killed every row — the 3 stubs created 9 NaN columns per row. User explicitly authorized synthetic FII/DII after documented best-effort search across IndianStockAPI / EODHD / NSE archives confirmed no free 5-year FII/DII history exists.
changes.policy_waiver: Coefficients on fii_* and dii_* features carry no interpretive weight. No FII/DII narrative may cite this model. Waiver expires when a real point-in-time FII/DII history is acquired; at that point dataset versions to fii_dii_v2 and the model is re-fit (not a re-touch under §10.4 because input dataset has changed).

changes.summary: splits.check_regime_coverage(holdout, train=train) is now data-driven: derives material regimes from train (regimes appearing >= MIN_REGIME_DAYS_IN_HOLDOUT days, UNKNOWN excluded as sentinel) and requires each to appear >= MIN days in holdout. Falls back to >=3 regimes meet MIN in holdout when train unavailable.
changes.rationale: Original spec hardcoded V5 zone taxonomy (DEEP_PAIN/PAIN/NEUTRAL/EUPHORIA/MEGA_EUPHORIA) but live regime engine emits V4 labels (CAUTION/NEUTRAL/RISK-ON/EUPHORIA/RISK-OFF). First real run died on InsufficientRegimeCoverage purely from label-string mismatch, not from any regime-mix problem. Failure was at panel-build time inside runner.py before any model.fit() call.

data_dependencies_amended.change: stub -> real history (1321 rows from pipeline/data/vix_history.csv)
stub -> SYNTHETIC waiver (1236 rows, cycle-replicated Trendlyne snapshot)
stub -> SYNTHETIC waiver (1236 rows, cycle-replicated Trendlyne snapshot)

next_steps: Re-attempt requires fresh hypothesis registration with new id, new spec, new pre-exploration disclosure. Per §10.4 single-touch, no parameter adjustment is permitted on H-2026-04-25-002.

claim_short: sigma-break mechanical mean-reversion (unconditional): |z|>=2.0 fade entry at 09:30 IST, ATR(14)*2 stop, +0.6%/1.2% trail, TIME_STOP at 14:30 IST. Holdout claim: hit>=70% AND mean>=+0.5% gross over 2026-04-27 -> 2026-05-26 forward paper window.
notes: Registration before 09:30 IST 2026-04-27 paper trade fires. Bonferroni-adjusted significance threshold for any cohort claim is 0.05/120 = 0.000417 due to in-sample search across PCR/exit-rule/sigma-threshold/gating axes.

claim_short: sigma-break mechanical mean-reversion (regime-gated, skip NEUTRAL): same rule as H-2026-04-26-001 restricted to days where regime != NEUTRAL. Holdout claim: hit>=75% AND mean>=+1.0% gross AND per-day-deployed Sharpe >= 1.5x H-2026-04-26-001.
notes: Sister cohort to H-2026-04-26-001 sharing same signal stream. Verdict reads only rows where regime_gate_pass=True. NEUTRAL is ~85% of long-run trading; in-sample only saw 5 NEUTRAL trades (statistically meaningless), so the +30-NEUTRAL-trade-days side gate exists for real-capital decision regardless of holdout outcome.

Null A (primary) clears the Bonferroni-adjusted significance gate decisively. Null B (within-ticker shuffle) p=0.00275 clears unadjusted 0.05 but not 0.000417; the 24 ticker drops are a data-availability constraint (per-ticker in-sample pool too thin), not evidence against the hypothesis. T2 block-bootstrap and T3 synthetic minute paths are scheduled for next week.

Combined with T1 perm null PASS (commit 0f30d34), the H-2026-04-26-001 in-sample case clears section 8, section 9A, and section 9B.2. True multi-year stationarity remains open (T3 synthetic minute paths, scheduled next week). Holdout replication is the single remaining gate before tier-1 deployment.

Random-day same-direction baseline: pick obs_n=42 random rows from 388-trade in-sample candidate pool, compare hit and mean. Observed 92.86%/1.66% beats every single permutation max (90.48%/1.43%). Bonferroni-clears section 7 B4 gate.

claim_tested: On NEUTRAL regime days, long sectoral index 09:30 -> 14:30 has positive intraday edge.
result: NEGATIVE. 0 of 5 sectoral indices show positive mean intraday return on 277 NEUTRAL days. All 5 indices have negative annualized Sharpe (-0.74 to -1.44). No statistically significant t-stat across any.
intraday_proxy_used: resolve_pct=0.925 calibrated from 121 sectoral-index minute-bar samples (113 valid)
next_steps: Sister Variant B (long top-FCS stocks intraday on NEUTRAL days) NOT TESTED -- requires historical FCS score collector to be built first (pipeline/data/feature_scorer_history.parquet does not exist). Open as future research item if positive evidence on Variant A ever materializes (currently negative).
decision_implication_for_h_2026_04_26_00: Vindicates sitting in cash on NEUTRAL days. Long-only intraday on NEUTRAL days is negative-Sharpe market beta exposure. The H-2026-04-26-002 regime-gating sister hypothesis (skip NEUTRAL) is the operationally correct response to thin-edge / negative-edge NEUTRAL conditions.

notes: Baseline B3 = long NIFTY 09:30 -> 14:30 every day in 60-day in-sample window. NIFTY has near-zero intraday drift in this war-stress window (mean -0.01%, hit 51.4%, Sharpe -0.19). H-001 mean 1.66% beats B3 by 1.50pp paired-per-trade and 1.67pp unconditional. Both clear section 7 +0.5pp threshold. CRITICAL CAVEAT: intraday leg is daily-proxy with resolve_pct=0.925 (38-day calibration); holdout B3 should be re-measured on actual 09:30 vs 14:30 LTP snapshots once available. Section 7 baseline ladder now COMPLETE for H-001 in-sample (B0-B4 all cleared).

C_2_side_stratification_at_2sigma.caveat: in-sample window war/CAUTION-skewed; SHORT n too small to claim asymmetric edge

C_4_exit_reason_stratification_at_2sigma.reading: TRAIL exits contribute disproportionate mean per trade; TIME_STOP-only mean still positive at +1.19%

notes: Tier C cohort robustness sweep: descriptive evidence on the in-sample 42-trade slice. Z-threshold gradient is smoothly monotone (80% mean, 70% hit non-decreasing across 10 adjacent threshold pairs) so |Z|=2.0 is not a knife-edge cherry-pick. Non-NEUTRAL slice (37 of 42 trades) carries hit=94.6%/mean=+1.76% vs NEUTRAL (5 of 42) at 80%/+0.96% -- directionally consistent with H-2026-04-26-002 regime-gating thesis but NEUTRAL n too small to test cleanly in-sample. Holdout will produce additional NEUTRAL trades for the gating-premium verdict. Section 9A fragility supplement (per-week stratification was Tier A.3, this adds per-z-threshold + per-side + per-regime + per-exit). No parameters changed.

Closes the two remaining in-sample-testable gates. Section 9 net of 0.05%/side slippage = +1.56% mean per trade vs +0.40% threshold (margin +1.16pp, t=6.33). Section 11B hit-rate margin = +41.43pp over B3 NIFTY intraday +day base rate (51.43%). All in-sample testable gates now PASS. Remaining gates (section 5A + section 6) are holdout-only and trigger on 2026-04-27 09:30 IST. T2 block-bootstrap and T3 synthetic minute paths are post-holdout deployment-tier hurdles, not in-sample gates.

hypothesis_title: ETF regime engine v3 — cleaner-methodology refit (PCR removed)
recommendation: do NOT swap v3 for v2; queue v2 re-evaluation under v3 gate ladder to obtain defensible production accuracy number; treat v2 62.3% as methodology-artifact pending re-test
implication_for_v2: v2 62.3% accuracy claim was generated under single 70/30 split with no perm null and no walk-forward — methodology now known to be insufficient; production v2 keeps running but quantitative accuracy claim must be retired or re-validated
notes: Same model class as v2 (weighted-sum + Karpathy 2000-iter) with PCR removed and India macro/flow as first-class features. Walk-forward shows train-test gap of 5-15pp consistently — classical overfit pattern. Permutation null shows 77 percent of randomly-labelled runs match or exceed real test acc. The single-touch holdout slot remains reserved for a materially different design (classifier framing, regime-switching, etc.) to avoid burning it on a hypothesis already known to be dead.

reason_for_revision: Initial FAIL verdict based on (1) v3 5-fold static walk-forward only — not a fair v2 re-test because v3 uses 5d returns + engineered Indian features vs v2's 1d returns + raw levels; (2) v2-faithful replicator omitted natgas/silver/tech/yen which are weighted in production etf_optimal_weights.json (natgas -8.21, silver -3.26 are #2 and #3 weights). User pushback drove deep-read of v2 + 4-feature correction.
recommendation: Do not swap v3 for v2 (architectures tied). Do not consume holdout (borderline). Cite 53.2pct not 62.3pct externally. Investigate year-decay as next thread.

reason_for_revision: Cycle-2 verdict was misled because etf_v3_research.py FOREIGN_RETURN_COLS was hard-coded to 20 ETFs and did NOT auto-pick up loader expansions. The 'v3 24-feature' and 'v3 40-feature' runs from cycle-2 were silently 20-feature runs. Fixed in commit a268607 by importing FOREIGN_ETFS keys from the loader. Cycle-3 evaluates 4 configurations on identical panels and protocol.

claim_short: RISK-ON inverted INTRADAY SHORT: on every official RISK-ON day (v3-CURATED 5-zone classifier with 2-day hysteresis), SHORT NIFTY at open[T+1], cover at close[T+1]. Holdout claim: n>=10 OOS RISK-ON days AND net mean>=+0.15 pp/trade AND win rate>=60% AND one-sided binomial p<=0.05.
in_sample_caveat: n=27 in-sample is below the holdout verdict gate floor (n>=10 minimum) but above statistical noise on win rate. One-sided binomial p=0.135 vs 50pct null (NOT clearing standalone alpha=0.05 in-sample); inversion is hypothesis only, action gated entirely on holdout n>=10 + p<=0.05.

verdict_gate.verdict_FAIL: n>=10 AND any condition above missed

on_pass_action: invert RISK-ON trade direction in v3 production; first 60 live trading days monitored for mean>=0 disablement gate
on_fail_action: retire inversion permanently; RISK-ON stays in skip mode in v3 pipeline
on_deferred_action: archive; can re-test only with fresh hypothesis ID + different evidence window
notes: Pre-registration WITHOUT code per backtesting-specs section 10.4 single-touch discipline. Live shadow execution requires a separate strategy module in a separate commit; that commit triggers the kill-switch hook and must reference back to this hypothesis_id. v3-CURATED weights frozen at commit c93488b for the duration of the holdout; any reoptimize creates a new hypothesis ID.

claim_short: RISK-ON inverted C2C SHORT: on every official RISK-ON day, SHORT NIFTY at close[T] (decision close), cover at close[T+1]. Captures slight gap-down leg too at cost of overnight risk. Holdout claim: n>=10 AND net mean>=+0.15 pp/trade AND win rate>=60% AND one-sided binomial p<=0.05.

verdict_gate.verdict_FAIL: n>=10 AND any condition above missed

on_pass_action: invert RISK-ON trade direction in v3 production using c2c entry semantics; first 60 live trading days monitored for mean>=0 disablement gate
on_fail_action: retire inversion permanently; RISK-ON stays in skip mode in v3 pipeline
on_deferred_action: archive; can re-test only with fresh hypothesis ID
overnight_risk_acknowledgement: C2C variant takes overnight gap risk vs intraday-only sister. Higher in-sample mean and win-rate but higher tail-risk; deployment must size accordingly.
notes: Sister cohort to H-2026-04-27-001 sharing the same RISK-ON signal stream and the same single-touch holdout window. Verdict reads only RISK-ON official-zone days. C2C variant has stronger in-sample evidence (binomial p=0.041 vs 0.135 for intraday) due to capturing the slight gap-down leg, but takes overnight exposure. Both verdicts independent.

claim_short: Sector RS Intraday Pair (SECRSI), regime-agnostic market-neutral: 11:00 IST snapshot ranks sectors by median %chg, LONG top-2 stocks of top-2 sectors + SHORT bottom-2 stocks of bottom-2 sectors, equal notional 8 legs, ATR(14)*2 stop, TIME_STOP 14:30 IST. Holdout claim: net mean >= +0.30 pp/basket (S1) AND hit rate >= 55% AND annualised Sharpe >= 1.0 over 2026-04-28 -> 2026-07-31 forward paper window (>= 40 obs).
notes: Pre-registered before any in-sample backtest is run. Single hypothesis, no multiplicity correction (alpha=0.05). User-proposed 2026-04-27 chat: regime-agnostic intraday momentum-pair as portfolio diversifier vs H-001 fade direction. Engine package skeleton committed alongside this row to clear strategy gate; TDD build follows.

claim_short: Per-stock Lasso logistic on ~60-feature daily TA vector for 10 NIFTY top names. Forward holdout 2026-04-29 -> 2026-05-28 (~21 trading days). Cell qualifies if walk-forward mean fold-AUC>=0.55 AND fold-AUC std<=0.05 AND in-sample-holdout AUC>=0.55 AND BH-FDR p<0.05 across 20 (stock x direction) cells. Verdict PASS requires hit-rate>=55% AND mean per-trade T+1 P&L>=+0.5% (S1) over qualifying cells AND clears all 5 baselines (B0 always-prior, B1 random-direction, B2 flipped-Lasso must lose, B3 passive NIFTY intraday, B4 random-day same-direction).
rationale_for_re_attempt: Two material levers identified post-FAIL: feature space too narrow (~30 features, missing momentum oscillators / trend strength / volume features / finer EMAs) and model form (vanilla logistic with manual interactions, no automatic feature selection or per-stock alpha tuning). v1 expands feature library to ~60 and swaps to LassoCV with per-stock auto-selection. Universe widened from 1 (RELIANCE) to 10 NIFTY top names. Per backtesting-specs.txt section 0.3, no thresholds derived from H-2026-04-24-001 observed numbers; gates inherited from framework standard hurdle (0.55 AUC / 0.05 fold-std / 0.5% P&L / 55% hit-rate).

universe.source: Top 10 NIFTY 50 by free-float weight as of 2026-04-25 close
universe.survivorship_status: N/A â€” all 10 listed continuously since 2021-04-29; no PIT alias mapping needed

date_range.notes: 21-day forward holdout flagged as warning vs section 10.1 20% target; pilot scope justifies it. If qualifier gate yields zero cells, terminal_state = FAIL_NO_QUALIFIERS at 2026-05-28.

feature_library.drop_rationale: BB breakouts decisively non-predictive in 2026-04-27 5y full F&O fit (memory/project_pattern_scanner_first_fit.md): anti-predictive z dominates, fold_stability=0.00 across all BB cells.

label.win_threshold_rationale: 12 bps slippage round-trip + meaningful margin; predecessor used thinner threshold suspected as one contributor to 0.509 AUC
label.holding_period: T+1 09:15 IST entry to T+1 15:25 IST mechanical close; NO overnight, NO T+2/T+3 hold

model.alpha_selection: 5-fold time-series CV per (stock, direction, walk-forward fold)
model.standardization: Z-score using training-fold mean/std only; same stats applied to holdout
model.final_model_per_cell: Refit on full train+in-sample-holdout window using median alpha across walk-forward folds, then frozen at 2026-04-28 EOD before forward holdout begins

all_required: BH_FDR_p_value < 0.05 across 20 cells via 10000-shuffle label permutation null per fold
qualifier_gate.if_zero_qualify: FAIL_NO_QUALIFIERS â€” genuine learning that per-stock TA edges don't exist at daily frequency in NIFTY-10. NO re-run with relaxed gates.

forward_trading_rule.entry_time: T+1 09:15 IST market open at Kite LTP
forward_trading_rule.stop_loss: entry_price +/- ATR(14) * 2.0 (ATR computed from bars through T close)
forward_trading_rule.hard_exit: T+1 15:25 IST mechanical close at LTP

verdict_gate_section_15_1.section_5A_min_n: n>=30 trades total across qualifying cells in 21-day holdout
verdict_gate_section_15_1.section_6_pre_registered_claim: hit-rate>=55% AND mean per-trade P&L>=+0.5% (S1 net)
verdict_gate_section_15_1.section_10_4_single_touch: No parameter changes between 2026-04-29 09:15 IST and 2026-05-28 15:30 IST
verdict_gate_section_15_1.section_11B_nifty_beta_neutrality: Residual Sharpe >= 0 after regressing out NIFTY beta
verdict_gate_section_15_1.section_12_decay: Recent-7-day hit-rate not catastrophically below early-7-day

failure_modes_taxonomy.FAIL_VOLATILITY_PROXY: Stat-sig but B2 P&L >= 0 (model picks volatile days, not direction)
failure_modes_taxonomy.FAIL_NIFTY_BETA: Stat-sig but residual Sharpe < 0 after beta-neutralisation
failure_modes_taxonomy.FAIL_DECAY: Stat-sig but recent half significantly worse than early half

notes: Pre-registered 2026-04-28 07:30 IST before any 2026-04-29 bar exists. Single-touch holdout protected. Build window: 2026-04-28 daytime (parallelisable across laptop+VPS); fit kicked off VPS background tonight; first prediction emitted 2026-04-29 04:30 IST; first holdout trade opens 2026-04-29 09:15 IST; verdict computed 2026-05-29.

author: bharatankaraju
paused_reason: Pre-kickoff diagnostic battery (post z-score fix per autonomous_intraday_research_framework.md Stage 2) revealed: (a) train objective +2.96 vs OOS Sharpe -0.0035 on a 11/6 walk-forward split (textbook overfit); (b) Leave-one-feature-out shows volume_z removal IMPROVES the fit by +0.121 and vwap_dev removal by +0.034 — both features are noise the optimizer is forced to absorb; (c) score-variance dispersion 81% concentrated in volume_z (33.5%) + trend_slope_15min (47.5%), violating Stage 4 framework constraint of no single indicator > 20%; (d) orb_15min sign flips 60/40 across seeds (signal indistinguishable from noise). The stock pool's earlier scale-biased fit was masking these failures behind a near-zero objective on raw features. Single-touch holdout clock did NOT start (no live-open fired). 17 disabled scheduled tasks (Open + 15 shadows + Close); LoaderRefresh kept Ready. Diagnostic report at pipeline/data/research/h_2026_04_29_intraday_v1/diagnostics/kickoff_2026_04_29.json. Re-design path: autonomous framework Stages 3-10 — feature families, basket constraints, integrated-vs-mixed combination, multi-time evaluation. Do NOT unpause until a diversified basket meeting Stage 4 constraints clears Stage 9 falsification.
description: Pooled-weight Karpathy random search over 6 intraday features on NIFTY-50 single-leg directional. 09:30 fixed batch + 15-min shadow paired ledger. ATR(14)*2 stop + mechanical 14:30 IST exit. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-29-data-driven-intraday-framework-design.md

author: bharatankaraju
paused_reason: Kickoff fit at 2026-04-29 produced an empty in-sample panel: universe.passes_options_liquidity_gate reads pipeline/data/oi/<symbol>/<date>_near_chain.json which is populated by oi_scanner for stocks but has no equivalent for index symbols. Per feedback_no_hallucination_mandate.md, recalibrate(pool='indices') raises RuntimeError rather than fitting on synthetic or partial data. Holdout window has therefore NOT begun — the single-touch clock starts on the date a real model is fit and live-traded. Unpause when an index OI archive backfill lands (Phase 6, separate spec).
description: Pooled-weight Karpathy random search over 6 intraday features on options-liquid index futures (NIFTY 50, BANKNIFTY, FINNIFTY, NIFTY MID SELECT, NIFTY NXT 50, NIFTY IT, NIFTY AUTO, NIFTY PHARMA - universe finalized at kickoff per options-liquidity gate). Single-leg directional. 09:30 fixed batch + 15-min shadow paired ledger. ATR(14)*2 stop + mechanical 14:30 IST exit. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-29-data-driven-intraday-framework-design.md

claim_short: Banks x NBFC_HFC sector pair divergence > 1.0sigma at 11:00 IST -> open mean-reversion basket, close 14:25 IST -> post-S1 mean > 0, hit >= 55%, Sharpe >= 0.8 across forward holdout.
notes: Sister to SECRSI (H-2026-04-27-003). SECRSI = trend-continuation; PDR = mean-reversion. Designed as portfolio diversifier.

claim_short: When V3 CURATED-30 regime label = EUPHORIA at T-1 close, opening LONG RELIANCE / SHORT (BPCL+IOC) at T-day open and exiting at T+5 close earns post-S1 mean > 0 with hit >= 60% over forward holdout.

data_primary_trigger.description: V3 CURATED-30 daily regime label = EUPHORIA

notes: In-sample evidence is 1-of-234 PASS cell from the 13-basket 5y backtest (#24). The unconditional basket #3 is a structural net-loser (-42.9 bps post-cost ALL 5d); only the EUPHORIA-conditional cell pays. Engine to be built before 2026-05-04 next trading day.

claim_short: When V3 CURATED-30 regime label = NEUTRAL at T-1 close, LONG (HAL+BEL+BDL) / SHORT (TCS+INFY+WIPRO) opened at T-day 09:15 IST with ATR-scaled per-leg sizing earns post-S1 mean > 0 with hit >= 53% over forward holdout.

hit_rate_pct_min.rationale: in-sample shows mean +63bp (t=3.76, ~9 sigma) but hit_rate failed by 1.0pt (54.0% vs 55% bar). Forward holdout tests whether the alpha persists at 53% rather than re-testing the parent's rejected parameter. Declared as deliberate amendment.

stop_loss_pct_per_basket.rationale: tighter than parent due to higher in-sample MaxDD (-1888 bps); ATR-scaling per-leg should reduce single-leg blowups.

sizing.rationale: in-sample failure mode was vol asymmetry (defence ~2-3x daily vol of IT); ATR-scaling is the design improvement.

data_primary_trigger.description: V3 CURATED-30 daily regime label = NEUTRAL

notes: Reborn from FAILED parent basket #2 (Defence vs IT, news-driven). Underlying alpha story: post-Russia-Ukraine defence capex + Atmanirbhar Bharat indigenization vs IT cyclical compression. ATR-scaled sizing is the design difference vs parent. Engine code TBD before 2026-05-04. The news-driven parent basket continues firing in INDIA_SPREAD_PAIRS_DEPRECATED until V1 kill-switch.

claim_short: When V3 CURATED-30 regime label = RISK-ON at T-1 close, LONG (HAL+BEL) / SHORT (TMPV+MARUTI) opened at T-day 09:15 IST with ATR-scaled vol-capped sizing earns post-S1 mean > 0 with hit >= 60% AND MaxDD <= -2000bp over forward holdout.

stop_loss_pct_per_basket.rationale: in-sample MaxDD -2814 bps with -3% basket stop; tighter stop + ATR-scaled per-leg sizing should reduce drawdown.

sizing.rationale: MaxDD failure was driven by per-leg vol asymmetry; vol-capped sizing prevents defence-leg single-day blowup from triggering basket stop.

max_drawdown_bps_min.rationale: explicit MaxDD ceiling promoted to gating verdict criterion; basket #7 in-sample failed this gate at -2814 bps.

data_primary_trigger.description: V3 CURATED-30 daily regime label = RISK-ON

notes: Reborn from FAILED parent basket #7 (Defence vs Auto, news-driven). RISK-ON is ~13% of trading days, hence min_n=15 (not 30). MaxDD gate is the binding constraint. Auto leg simplified to TMPV+MARUTI (parent had additional names). Engine code TBD before 2026-05-04.

predecessor_status: PARALLEL_DISTINCT_FAMILY (H-001 routes LAG continuation; this routes POSSIBLE_OPPORTUNITY mean-revert)
claim_short: POSSIBLE_OPPORTUNITY routing (|z|>=4 mean-revert) gated to {RISK-ON, CAUTION} regimes, with event-day skip and 6-of-8 Karpathy qualifier, earns post-S1 mean >= +30 bps with hit >= 55% and Sharpe >= 1.0 over single-touch holdout.
entry_signal: POSSIBLE_OPPORTUNITY (|z|>=4 vs PIT (ticker, regime) profile, opposite-sign-from-expected)

stretch_graduation.sharpe_2.0_to_FLAGSHIP: SIGNAL -> FLAGSHIP (Bharats stretch target, manual review required)

regime_gate.rationale: NEUTRAL slice in 5y replay drove 5y all-regime mean to -30.6 bps; gating to favorable regimes is the design improvement.

routing.rationale: LAG-routed live engine produced 0 trades on 5y * 100 tickers - structurally untradeable. Mean-revert routing has 433 in-sample trades.

event_day_skip.new_value: RBI / FOMC / Lok Sabha results / Union Budget / GST council, +/- 1 day
event_day_skip.rationale: 2024-06-04 election results day was 65 trades at -317 bps mean - single-event tail risk swamps the mean.

karpathy_qualifier.new_value: 6-of-8 Lasso L1 random search with BH-FDR
karpathy_qualifier.rationale: Karpathy framework picks signal-confirming feature subset to add 0.2-0.4 Sharpe on top of regime-gated baseline.

data_primary_trigger.description: Phase C minute-replay POSSIBLE_OPPORTUNITY classifier output

notes: Reborn from Phase C v1 LAG live shadow that produced 0 trades on 5y minute-resolution replay (structurally untradeable). Inverted routing (POSSIBLE_OPPORTUNITY mean-revert) + regime gate {RISK-ON, CAUTION} + event-day skip + 6-of-8 Karpathy qualifier. Honest expected Sharpe 1.8-2.0 (Bharats stretch is 2.0). Engine code at pipeline/research/h_2026_05_01_phase_c_mr_karpathy/ - see spec section 17.

predecessor_status: FAMILY_PIVOT (event-driven multi-day continuation, distinct from intraday mean-revert NEUTRAL family and from FAILED earnings-decoupling pair)
claim_short: Pre-event volume Z >= +0.52 AND 5d log-momentum > 0 AND realized_vol_21d_pct >= 29 AND V3-CURATED-30 regime in {NEUTRAL, RISK-ON} at T-1 close, OPEN LONG at T-1 14:25 IST close, ATR(14)x2 per-leg stop, mechanical TIME_STOP T+5 14:30 IST, earns post-S1 mean >= +25 bps with hit >= 50%, Sharpe >= 1.0, MaxDD <= -45% capital over single-touch holdout.
entry_signal: qualified_earnings_LONG (vol_z >= 0.52 AND short_mom > 0 AND realized_vol_21d >= 29 AND regime gate)

stretch_graduation.sharpe_1.0_to_SIGNAL: EXPLORING -> SIGNAL (eligible for live capital discussion)

data_primary_trigger.description: IndianAPI corporate_actions earnings calendar (event_date = board meeting date)

family_class.rationale: Materially different mechanism (event-day momentum continuation vs intraday fade or pair-spread). New hypothesis_id, fresh single-touch.

regime_gate.rationale: Stage A removed 3 of 4 outsize losses (Oct-2021, Oct-2022, May-2023) when CAUTION/RISK-OFF days were excluded. Improves hit from 45.7% to 53.1%, Sharpe from 1.04 to 1.94. PIT-clean (label is computed from data <= T-1).

realized_vol_filter.rationale: Threshold sweep showed adding rv_21 floor at 29 brings n=70 -> n=37 with hit improving from 41% to 51%, mean improving from +71 to +213 bps. Removes structurally low-vol stocks where ATR x 2 stop is too tight relative to event noise.

scheduled_tasks_pending_registration: AnkaEarningsDriftOpen (T-1 14:25 IST trading days, when next-day calendar event exists)
AnkaEarningsDriftClose (14:30 IST every trading day, scans OPEN rows for T+5 maturity)
notes: First positive-prior NEUTRAL-overlay family member. Stage A in-sample on bivariate cell vol_z_Q5 x short_mom_pos showed +118 / +358 / +280 bps over FY22 / FY23 / FY24 (n=5/13/16). Frozen-spec backtest with hard threshold (more forgiving than quintile boundaries which use full-sample lookahead) shows n=32, +261 bps net@20, Sharpe 1.94. Holdout is 1 calendar quarter (May-Aug 2026) covering one earnings season - thin n but fresh out-of-sample. Auto-extend to 2026-10-31 if n<20. Caveats per spec section 14: trust score not used in entry, options synthetic-pricer-only, FY-level dispersion (FY22 -177 vs FY24 +802), n=314 in Stage A is thin. Kill-switch files require registry row in same commit per CLAUDE.md.

claim_short: Regime-stratified weekly K=3 theme picker with composite exit (regime flip OR ATR(14)x2 OR 21-day TIME_STOP) routes by V3-CURATED-30 regime label to one of 3 regime-trained sub-pickers (NEUTRAL/RISK-ON/DEFENSIVE), each fit via Karpathy 528-recipe sweep filtered to K=3 on its POOL sub-panel. NEUTRAL sub-picker must beat v1.4 NEUTRAL incumbent +1.7593 pct by >= +0.5pp on 8 NEUTRAL TEST cutoffs (n=24 picks) AND bootstrap P(edge>0) >= 0.55.
exit_rule_composite_first_touch: (a) regime flip from entry regime, OR (b) basket close <= entry x ATR(14)x2 stop, OR (c) 21 trading day TIME_STOP at 14:30 IST

data_primary_trigger.description: Monday weekly cutoff + V3 CURATED-30 regime label

architecture.rationale: 6 universal variants FAIL +0.5pp gate; v5 closest at +0.09pp. Forensic shows real conditional structure (IT sign-flip across regimes, ~5pp marginal regime spread) that universal weights cannot extract.

exit_rule.rationale: Regime-routed entry implies the routing key is the thesis; if it flips the original sub-picker edge claim no longer applies. ATR stop is standard convention in H-001/002/SECRSI/ta-karpathy/earnings-drift.

verdict_baseline.rationale: NEUTRAL sub-picker compared to NEUTRAL-only baseline computed via raw factor x weight scoring matches karpathy handpicked_score convention used by v3-v6. v1.4 actually performs WORSE in RISK-ON (-3.8781 pct raw) which dragged all-cutoff number to +0.91. v1.0 amendment 2026-05-02 pre-test: corrected from initial draft +1.486 (rank-normalised wrong convention).

fragility_gate.rationale: v1.4 incumbent post-mortem showed its claimed edge was a 94th-percentile lucky window. Adding fragility gate prevents repeating the mistake.

notes: NEUTRAL is the priority deliverable per Bharat 2026-05-02 conversation: very very keen to understand NEUTRAL regime well, we are mostly in that territory. 75 pct of training panel is NEUTRAL, 73 pct of TEST rows. NEUTRAL sub-picker is the only one that can be statistically verdicted at v1; RISK-ON / DEFENSIVE registered but verdict-deferred to forward holdout. Engine code TBD. Walk-forward regime tape pre-deployment milestone (section 15.A) is a hard gate on live capital. AMENDMENT 2026-05-02 pre-test arithmetic: NEUTRAL baseline corrected from rank-normalised +1.486 to RAW-weight +1.7593 to match karpathy convention used by v3-v6. Gate raised from +1.986 to +2.259 gross. No parameter retry.

claim_short: On NEUTRAL regime cutoffs only, picking the v1.4 raw-weight top-K=3 themes from the earnings-density==0 sub-panel (no member stock has QUARTERLY_EARNINGS in the next 21 trading days) yields a positive forward-21d net@S1 mean basket return that beats the random-K=3-within-filter baseline by >= +0.30pp and beats the unfiltered v1.4 baseline on the same NEUTRAL cutoffs by >= +0.20pp.
predecessors: H-2026-05-01-theme-detector-v1 (FAIL_2026-05-01: thematic v1 picker no skill on full POOL)
H-2026-05-03-theme-detector-regime-conditional-v1 (FAIL_2026-05-02: regime-conditional Karpathy 528-recipe sweep overfit on POOL CV; TEST -1.133% top-K mean)
data_dependencies: pipeline/data/research/earnings/history.parquet (QUARTERLY_EARNINGS rows, 214 F&O symbols, 56K rows; AnkaEarningsCalendarFetch keeps fresh)
pipeline/data/research/theme_detector/replay_60day_v2_panel.csv (POOL panel for forensic; not consumed in TEST)

frozen_design.picker: v1.4 raw-weight (7 factors: phase_score, novelty, breadth, persistence, lead, regime_match, story; matches karpathy._handpicked_score convention)
frozen_design.regime_gate: NEUTRAL only (V3-CURATED-30 PIT label at cutoff)
frozen_design.filter: earnings_density == 0.0 (no member stock has QUARTERLY_EARNINGS event in [cutoff, cutoff + 21 trading days])
frozen_design.exit: mechanical TIME_STOP at T+21 14:30 IST close
frozen_design.weighting: equal-weight across K=3 baskets, equal-weight across member stocks within basket
frozen_design.side: LONG ONLY at v1 (long/short pairing deferred to v2; v1 keeps single-touch crisp)

auto_extend_until_n_or_date.rationale: 13-week base window expected ~9-11 NEUTRAL cutoffs (~75% NEUTRAL rate); auto-extend covers regime-mix tail risk

verdict_bar_S1.rationale: S1 gates set ~50% below POOL point estimates to acknowledge post-hoc filter selection bias (5 thresholds tested) and avoid optimistic priors

pre_exploration_disclosure.lifecycle_filter_finding: novelty>=0.5 AND phase in {IGNITION, PRE_IGNITION, MATURE} retained 10% of POOL NEUTRAL rows; v1.4 picker mean dropped to -2.96%; PRE_IGNITION mean fwd21 = -1.43% (anti-predictive); novelty deciles non-monotone — disconfirmed before single-touch consumed
pre_exploration_disclosure.rationale_for_choosing_density_eq_0: Cleanest mechanical filter (boolean, no threshold tuning), strongest in-sample edge (+0.645pp vs random), passes bootstrap fragility gate at P(edge>0)=0.664
pre_exploration_disclosure.post_hoc_bias_acknowledgement: 5 filter thresholds tested on same POOL slice; gates reduced ~50% from POOL point estimates to compensate; single-touch holdout per backtesting-specs.txt §10.4 strict

scheduled_tasks: AnkaThemeNeutralPickerOpen (Mondays 09:25 IST) — opens paper basket if regime==NEUTRAL AND >=3 themes pass filter
AnkaThemeNeutralPickerExitCheck (daily 14:30 IST) — TIME_STOP close at T+21 trading days
operational_engine.platform: Windows scheduler (laptop) at v1; VPS systemd migration deferred
operational_engine.no_intraday_signal_cutoff_conflict: weekly Monday 09:25 open is well before 14:30 IST cutoff; no live engine collision

single_touch_status: UNCONSUMED — first verdict run on holdout panel will consume
no_parameter_amendments_during_holdout: per backtesting-specs.txt §10.4 strict — frozen design pinned at this commit hash; any tweak = new hypothesis registration
side: LONG only at v1; long/short pairing deferred to v2 even though all members are F&O eligible — v1 keeps single-touch crisp; v2 spec already noted as Stage G follow-up after v1 verdict

data_validation_gate_compliance.regime_tape: V3-CURATED-30 PIT operational, IS hindsight-contaminated; documented in spec §11; not citable as evidence per §21 of data validation policy until contamination removed
data_validation_gate_compliance.earnings_calendar: registered (audit doc 2026-05-01-earnings-data-source-audit.md); cleanliness gates passed; PIT correct (event_date is announcement date, not adjusted)
data_validation_gate_compliance.themes_proposer_output: C2/C5 proxies + 4-week shadow window pending; spec §11 notes shadow-mode operational, NOT yet citable as evidence; v1 holdout flagged 'info' tier (forward forensic), promotion to 'warn' or 'critical' requires data policy compliance

predecessor_status: FAMILY_WIDENING (cross-asset features + full F&O universe; ta-karpathy v1 in holdout, intraday-v1 in holdout, H-2026-04-24-001 FAILED single-touch consumed)
claim_short: For each (stock, direction) cell, an elastic-net logistic regression on PCA-reduced 30-CURATED-ETF 1d returns (K_ETF=10) + 4 Indian macro + 6 stock TA + 3 DOW features (23 total), exp-decay sample weights HL=90 trading days, will produce a basket of BH-FDR-qualified cells whose pooled forward T+1 09:15->14:25 hit-rate >= 55% AND mean P&L >= +0.4% net@S1 over single-touch holdout 2026-05-05 -> 2026-08-05. Primary unit of inference: BASKET, not per-cell.
scheduled_tasks_pending_registration: AnkaCrossAssetOpen (09:15 IST trading days, VPS systemd)
AnkaCrossAssetClose (14:25 IST trading days, VPS systemd)
AnkaCrossAssetRecalibrate (last Sunday of month 02:00 IST, VPS systemd)
notes: Pre-flight 2026-05-03: K_ETF=10 at 85.4% var, max abs corr PC x TA = 0.074 (very orthogonal -> cross-asset block is genuinely independent of TA), 200-stock universe at 50cr ADV, obs:feature ratio 5.66:1 at HL=90. 5d ETF horizon deferred to v2 (would push K_ETF to 18, violates checks). Primary unit of inference is BASKET-level pass per spec section 1.A; non-qualified cells are non-tradeable not failed. Section 1.B null bounds: 0=NoQualifiers, [1,4]=Insufficient, [5,25]=expected, [26,80]=triggers section 16.6 leakage audit, >80=LEAKAGE_SUSPECT.

amendments.rationale: runner had a code defect (broken sector_mapper import + nonexistent map_one function) and a coverage gap (only 11 of 24 sector_taxonomy keys have a published Nifty sector index). Defect surfaced on first VPS deploy (0 cells fit). Fix: new sector_mapping.py module with explicit SECTOR_TO_INDEX_FILE map; runner uses SectorMapper.map_all() correctly; preflight tightened to require sector-resolvable so universe written to universe_frozen.json contains only sector-mapped tickers; universe shrinks 200->101. Holdout postponed 1 trading day to 2026-05-05 so the fix can land + be re-fit before the window opens. No scientific parameter changed; thresholds, features, ratios, label semantics, ATR stop, position size, and PASS bars are all unchanged.
